---
title: "Louis Huard"
---

## Louis Huard

**Dates:** (1813-1874

### Description

French illustrator

### Biography

Among other works he illustrated the Keary sisters <i>[[otherbook:534]The Heroes of Asgard]</i>.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 30th [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
